_comment: ILLUSTRATIVE placeholder situations for the Layer-2 grade calibration (data/sample_grade_situations.json). Replace with ~12-15 REAL situations that Josh + Abhi each gut-grade A-F from the raw numbers BEFORE seeing the formula's output. flag_severities is the list of the run's distinct client accuracy flags by severity. Run: python -m src.pipeline.grade_calibration

_fields.label: short name for the situation
_fields.raw_visibility: prominence-weighted visibility in [0,1] (the leaderboard number, pre-penalty)
_fields.flag_severities: list of severities of the distinct client accuracy flags, e.g. ["high","high","med","low"]
_fields.human_grade: the analyst's gut letter A-F, decided before looking at the formula

situations.label: present but riddled with high-severity errors
